pi_items.source: Task instructions confirm this requires setting up an IFC hierarchy from scratch.
Task involves creating and saving a new IFC hierarchy.
Creating BIM project structures is an architect role.
BIM software and IFC formats belong to the AEC industry.

privileged_info_summary: The task is a generative synthetic exercise requiring the creation of a new IFC project from scratch using BlenderBIM. The agent must construct a standard IFC hierarchy (IfcProject, IfcSite, IfcBuilding, IfcBuildingStorey), name the project 'Office Building', and save the resulting file to '/home/ga/BIMProjects/office_building.ifc'. There is no local programmatic verifier; evaluation relies entirely on an external VLM, as indicated by the stub verifier.py.
